issues.description: Unused type: ignore comment on line 207 in y/datatypes.py. The line `return NotImplemented  # type: ignore[return-value]` has a suppressor that mypy flags as unused with strict settings.
issues.suggestedFix: Remove the `# type: ignore[return-value]` comment since mypy reports it as unused.

summary: PriceResult and PriceStep dataclasses are correctly implemented with all required fields and float backward-compatibility operators. The implementation satisfies VAL-PATH-001 and VAL-PATH-002. Tests are comprehensive (40 tests covering construction, float compat, comparison, arithmetic, Decimal handling, bool, repr, hash, and abs). One minor issue: an unused `type: ignore` comment on line 207 that mypy flags under strict mode.
